2015April 19, 2015

🇮🇹 Vico Equense (Naples), Italy

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Vico Equense, Italy, April 19, 2015 -- April 24, 2015

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2015-04-vico-equense-italy

17 Resolutions

906Plenary
Appoint Aminata Mbengue as WG 23 Convener
SC4 appoints Aminata Mbengue as Convener for WG 23 "Vocabulary validation team" for a three-year term, with appreciation for her offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
905Plenary
Inform ISO CS about Integrated Model for Digital Manufacturing project
SC4 requests its Secretariat to inform ISO CS about the proposed Integrated Model for Digital Manufacturing project as an example of the work that should be addressed by the meeting suggested by IS...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
904Plenary
Apply 2-month ballot duration to specific NP proposals
SC4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 2-month duration to the proposed NPs for: * Formal Semantic Models for the Configuration of Global Production Networks (SP-NET) -- ISO 20534 * Equivalence ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
903Plenary
Approve new PWI for Edition 3 of ISO 10303 AP239
SC4 approves a PWI to create a new edition 3 of 10303 AP239 "Product Life Cycle Support" as defined in SC 4 N2997.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
902Plenary
Launch DIS ballot for ISO 18828-2
SC4 requests its Secretariat to launch the DIS ballot for ISO 18828-2 -- "Reference process for seamless production planning - Standardized procedure for production systems engineering."
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
901Plenary
Assign ISO 18828 project to JWG 8
SC4 assigns the Reference process for seamless production planning project ISO 18828 to JWG 8.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
900Plenary
Approve new work item to create ISO 15531-44 Edition 2
SC4 approves a NP to create a new edition 2 of 15531-44 with the same scope as 15531-44 "Information modelling for shop floor data acquisition", using the accelerated timescale, with Anne-Francoise...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
899Plenary
Approve new work item to create ISO 10303-235 Edition 2
SC4 approves a NP to create a new edition of 10303-235 with the same scope as 10303-235 ed1 "Engineering properties for product design and verification", using the accelerated timescale, with Norma...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
898Plenary
Terminate SC 4 liaisons with multiple organizations
SC4 requests its Secretariat to terminate its liaisons with the following organizations: * CEN/ISSS Workshop ELSSI-EMD * United Nations Standard Products and Services Code (UNSPSC) * ISO/PC 246 Ant...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
897Plenary
Appoint Nils Sandsmark as SC 4 Liaison to Energistics
SC4 appoints Nils Sandsmark for a three-year term as the SC 4 Liaison to Energistics, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
896Plenary
Reappoint Anna Moreno as SC 4 Implementation Forum Co-Deputy
SC4 appoints Anna Moreno as Co-Deputy for the SC 4 Implementation Forum for a further three-year term, with appreciation for her offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
895Plenary
Reappoint Paul van Exel as SC 4 Implementation Forum Leader
SC4 appoints Paul van Exel as Leader for the SC 4 Implementation Forum for a further three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
894Plenary
Reappoint Timothy King as WG 13 Convener
SC4 appoints Timothy King as Convener for WG 13 "Industrial data quality" for a further three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
893Plenary
Reappoint Keith Hunten as WG 12 Convener
SC4 appoints Keith Hunten as Convener for WG 12 "STEP product modelling and resources" for a further three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
892Plenary
Reappoint Anne-Françoise Cutting-Decelle as JWG 8 Convener
SC4 appoints Anne-Françoise Cutting-Decelle as Convener for JWG 8 "Manufacturing process and management information" for a further three-year term, with appreciation for her offer to serve in that ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to our SC 4 Liaisons and those projects who presented at the Liaison Plenary: * TC 184 Liaison Report -- Howard Mason * TC 184 Big Picture -- Christophe Mouton * MoU/...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to Anna Moreno and her team for hosting the 69th ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Plenary in Vico Equense, Italy, 2015-04-19/24. Special acknowledgement is extended to the Hotel Orien...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
